case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ACCREDITED

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ACCREDITED JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACCREDITED $75,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $75,335.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
